definition:
A man living at the time of United Monarchy, first mentioned at 1Ki.7.13; also called Huram-abi (KJV: "Huram my father's") at 2Ch.2.13; 4.16; 
Another name of chi.ram (חִירָם "Hiram" H2438H)
 § Huram = "noble born"
1) son of Bela and grandson of Benjamin
2) king of Tyre allied with David and Solomon; alternate spelling for 'Hiram'
3) a chief architect of Solomon's temple; alternate spelling for 'Hiram'
